item.title: Stingrays are stinging more Southern Californians. Here’s why
item.description:

The post Stingrays are stinging more Southern Californians. Here’s why appeared first on Long Beach Post News.
item.source:markdown:
![](https://img.lbpost.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2023/06/23133845/Sting-7419.jpg)

item.description:

item.title: California renames César Chavez Day; Long Beach City Council votes to begin doing the same
item.description:
Newsom signed a bill to rename the state holiday, and local leaders voted to revise their recognition of it as well.

The post California renames César Chavez Day; Long Beach City Council votes to begin doing the same appeared first on Long Beach Post News.

Newsom signed a bill to rename the state holiday, and local leaders voted to revise their recognition of it as well.

item.title: LA Olympics will be first to impose IOC’s ban on trans athletes from women’s sports
item.description:
The new policy requires all athletes to undergo a genetic test to compete in women's sporting events at the Olympics.

The post LA Olympics will be first to impose IOC’s ban on trans athletes from women’s sports appeared first on Long Beach Post News.
item.source:markdown:
![](https://img.lbpost.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/03/27080418/ap26014007473626-125748-aiq6erga-622187-UHVHrpRN-1024x683.jpg)
The new policy requires all athletes to undergo a genetic test to compete in women's sporting events at the Olympics.
The post [LA Olympics will be first to impose IOC’s ban on trans athletes from women’s sports](https://lbpost.com/news/la-olympics-will-be-first-to-impose-iocs-ban-on-trans-athletes-from-womens-sports) appeared first on [Long Beach Post News](https://lbpost.com/news).
